title: GetSpecCoverage
description: Studio and future API surfaces need implementation coverage for a single spec ‚Äî which files and symbols the graph links to that spec ‚Äî without callers orchestrating multiple `CodeGraphProvider` query methods. `GetSpecCoverage` returns a structured coverage snapshot for one `specId`.
context: Studio and future API surfaces need implementation coverage for a single spec ‚Äî which files and symbols the graph links to that spec ‚Äî without callers orchestrating multiple `CodeGraphProvider` query methods. `GetSpecCoverage` returns a structured coverage snapshot for one `specId`.

rules:
`GetSpecCoverage.execute(input)` MUST return `GetSpecCoverageResult` with:

- `specId: string` ‚Äî echoed from input
- `found: boolean` ‚Äî `true` when `provider.getSpec(specId)` returns a node
- `coveredFiles: Relation[]` ‚Äî from `provider.getCoveredFiles(specId)`
- `coveredSymbols: Relation[]` ‚Äî from `provider.getCoveredSymbols(specId)`
- `fileCount: number` ‚Äî count of unique file targets in `coveredFiles`
- `symbolCount: number` ‚Äî count of unique symbol targets in `coveredSymbols`

When the spec is not indexed (`found: false`), coverage arrays MUST be empty and counts MUST be zero.

`GetSpecCoverageInput` MUST include:

- `provider: CodeGraphProvider` (already opened)
- `specId: string`

The use case MUST NOT open or close the provider.
`createGetSpecCoverage()` in composition MUST return a stateless `GetSpecCoverage` instance.

constraints: MUST NOT throw when the spec is absent from the graph ‚Äî return found: false instead.
MUST NOT load spec artifact content from SpecRepository.

scenarios.name: Indexed spec with coverage
given: a spec indexed with covered files and symbols
then: AND coveredFiles and coveredSymbols match provider relations

scenarios.name: Spec not in graph
then: AND arrays are empty and counts are zero

scenarios.name: Does not open or close provider
given: a mock provider with spied lifecycle methods
then: open and close are not called

scenarios.name: Factory returns stateless instance
then: it returns a GetSpecCoverage with no captured config
